knownCodeIssues.evidence: App.tsx ~1490 Navigate /flows/par → pingone-par-v9 BEFORE FlowsPar at ~1665. Specialty PingOnePARFlowV9.tsx:95 has mangled useState: (useState < 'oauth') | 'oidc'(getDefaultVariant()) → runtime TypeError: "oidc" is not a function. AuthErrorBoundary shows Authentication Error.
App.tsx ~1568 Navigate to="/flows/dpop" before FlowsDpop ~1671. Shell loads but DPoP flow UI (h1 title) never mounts.
Canonical map lists /flows/worker-token but App redirects worker-token → client-credentials and worker-token-v9 → worker-token (chain ends at client-credentials).
Playwright v2-authz-code-mock: Continue enabled before required fields (validation gap); mock exchange step does not show Token Response (E2E 2 failed / 5 structural passed).
knownCodeIssues.remediation: fixed in 069196201 (Continue gate + mock-client-secret + chromium E2E 7/7)

knownCodeIssues.evidence: par-v9 Navigate to /flows/par, but /flows/par itself redirects to crashing pingone-par-v9 — never reaches FlowsPar.
Still hit /flows/oidc-authorization-code-v9 etc.; those redirect to canonical/lab. Specs pass only as soft connectivity.
Default baseURL https://localhost:3000; running stack is :8000. local-8000 config required.
Page loads but 7 console errors (backup load 400, logger noise). Fixed: WorkerTokenBanner.tsx used non-transient `visible` prop.
knownCodeIssues.remediation: WorkerTokenBanner visible→$visible transient prop (styled-components DOM leak)

knownCodeIssues.evidence: After installing fake-indexeddb: 14 files / 72 tests passed (mock + fetch paths).

e2e.note: authz-code mock validation + token exchange UI
